title: Canadian Securities Litigation Landscape: A Conversation with Grant Vingoe, CEO of the OSC
content:
## Canadian Securities Litigation Landscape: A Conversation with Grant Vingoe, CEO of the OSC
McCarthy Tétrault is pleased to invite you to join us for a fireside discussion with Grant Vingoe , Chief Executive Officer of the Ontario Securities Commission. In this session, Wendy Berman , head of McCarthy Tétrault’s National Securities Litigation Group and former Vice-Chair of the Ontario Securities Commission, will sit down with Grant to discuss recent developments, emerging issues and key trends in the securities regulatory environment, including:
- Sustainability-related disclosure and combatting increased risk of greenwashing
- Fostering capital formation, including the Listed Issuer Financing Exemption and Self-Certified Investor Prospectus Exemption
- Regulatory initiatives for addressing risks relating to crypto asset products
This is your opportunity to hear first hand about securities regulatory priorities and initiatives for the Canadian capital markets for 2023-24. We hope you can join us.
For more information regarding this event, please email torontoevents@mccarthy.ca .
This program is eligible for up to 1.5 Substantive Hours under the Law Society of Ontario’s mandatory CPD Regime.
8:00 a.m. — Registration and Breakfast 8:30 a.m. — Fireside Chat 9:30 a.m. — Open Forum Q&A 10:00 a.m. — Session Concludes
- Law Society of Ontario – Substantive
